system.description: Wolfsbane (dried aconite flowers) may drive off werewolves and other lycanthropes if a character strikes the monster in hand-to-hand combat with the sprig. If the lycanthrope fails a Death saving throw, it must flee as if rebuked. Wolfsbane can be used to make a plant poison (p. XX). A character foolish enough to eat a pound of fresh wolfsbane must make a Death saving throw or die after one turn.
